answers.label: Creating technology — writing code, building apps, or working with AI
Deep solo work — headphones on, shipping features and fixing bugs
Optimizing — performance tuning, debugging, and making things efficient

milestones.title: Core Skill Learning
milestones.description: Learn the fundamentals: build a solid foundation in programming (python, java, or c++), data structures and algorithms, and version control (git) — these are the essential building blocks for a software developer

resources.title: Java Programming Fundamentals for Beginners
Beginner's Guide to Data Structures and Algorithms

SQL Database Basics and Tutorial

milestones.title: Intermediate / Advanced Skills
milestones.description: Deepen your expertise by developing intermediate-to-advanced skills in restful api development, database management (sql), and debugging and troubleshooting, applying them through exercises and case studies

resources.title: Beginner Crash Courses in RESTful API Development

milestones.title: Hands-on Practice
milestones.description: Gain hands-on experience by completing software projects, open-source contributions, or technical prototypes — focus on applying programming (python, java, or c++), and data structures and algorithms in realistic scenarios
